locations.title: TigerTag — Storage Locations
locations.description:
Enter your storage locations separated by commas (e.g. {example}).
You can update them later from the integration settings.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and API key.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the TigerTag API. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.no_locations: Please enter at least one location.

abort.already_configured: This TigerTag account is already configured.

init.title: Storage Locations
init.description: Enter your storage locations separated by commas (e.g. {example}).

error.no_locations: Please enter at least one location.

update_spool_weight.name: Update spool weight
update_spool_weight.description: Updates the remaining weight of a TigerTag spool by UID. Also updates the Twin Tag if the spool has one.

uid.name: Spool UID
uid.description: Unique identifier of the spool (visible in the entity attributes).

weight.name: Weight (grams)
weight.description: Total remaining weight on the spool, in grams.

container_weight.name: Empty spool weight (grams)
container_weight.description: Weight of the empty spool holder (tare). Leave at 0 if the weight provided is already net weight.

set_spool_room.name: Set spool storage location
set_spool_room.description: Assigns a spool to a storage location. Persisted locally across restarts.

room.name: Location
room.description: Name of the storage location. Set to null to remove.

set_spool_tare.name: Set spool tare (masterspool)
set_spool_tare.description: Overrides the official TigerTag tare for a spool. Useful with a non-official masterspool. Persisted locally.

tare.name: Tare (grams)
tare.description: Weight of the empty spool holder in grams.

set_bambu_ams_filament.name: Configure Bambu Lab AMS filament
set_bambu_ams_filament.description: Sends TigerTag spool data to a Bambu Lab AMS slot via the bambu_lab integration. Automatically updates the ams_location attribute.

uid.name: Spool UID
uid.description: Unique identifier of the TigerTag spool.

tray_entity_id.name: AMS tray entity
tray_entity_id.description: Entity ID of the Bambu Lab AMS tray (e.g. sensor.p2s_ams_1_slot_1).

refresh.name: Refresh inventory
refresh.description: Forces an immediate refresh of the TigerTag inventory from the API.
